name: Mizucon
description:
Mizucon is a fully fledged cosplay convention at sea, sailing from Oslo to Copenhagen. Partake in a cosplay convention while enjoying a vacation on a boat, with all the amenities and entertainment opportunities it entails.

The event combines a traditional anime / cosplay convention experience — competitions, panels and meet-ups — with the cruise format, so attendees travel together over a long weekend.
notes: Logo source is the site favicon (PNG) — the SvelteKit homepage doesn't expose a separate logo asset in the static HTML, so this is the cleanest image we could pull. Banner is the og:image (thumb_2026.jpeg) used for social sharing. Theme/header color is the site's theme-color meta (#982351). Dates and route confirmed via search results / Roster Con — cruise sails Oslo to Copenhagen and back, 23–25 October 2026. Verify image rights before publishing.
